HaLim Jun.

▎ Statement

Data science driven by a passion for global development problems. Specialised in international development, with hands-on expertise built across the private sector, the UN system, NGO collaborations, and academic research centres.

§ 03 — What I Bring

Data work that moves systems, not papers.

i.

UN-system fluency

Hands-on experience inside UNICEF, UNFPA, and the UN Secretariat (CRAF'd). Comfortable with Country Programme Documents, partnership management, and the operational cadence of country offices.

ii.

Operational data science

Not research-bench prototypes — production pipelines. Ran a $1M-revenue-per-day pricing pipeline at SOCAR with monitoring, alerting, and stakeholder reporting against the C-suite.

iii.

Geospatial & predictive AI

Specialist in geospatial predictive analytics — H3 hex clustering, mobility data, computer vision, and Bayesian/ML forecasting applied to humanitarian and commercial contexts alike.

iv.

NGO & field empathy

Worked directly with Fortify Health (New Delhi) and a Korean student NGO running fair-trade fundraising for a sanitary facility in Lao PDR. Comfortable when the dataset is messy and the field constraints are real.

v.

LLM pipelines for policy text

Built and maintains an LLM-based text-analysis inference pipeline at UNICEF, applied to 6,000 pages of country-strategy documents — from prompt orchestration to evaluation.

vi.

Strategic communication

BCG research-analyst internship, plus years of direct C-suite reporting. Translates between modeling assumptions and operational decisions without losing either side.

§ 04 — Where I'm Heading

Three lines I want to stay on.

i.

Emergency relief & food security

  • Reaching the most marginalised
  • Tangible, near-term impact
  • High operational priority
ii.

Operational projects, not just research

  • Direct work with country / regional offices
  • Open to collaboration with field offices in Africa & Asia
  • Models that hit a deployment surface
iii.

Specialist in data science

  • Predictive geospatial analytics
  • LLM pipelines for policy & strategy text
  • Production-grade modelling discipline
